---
id: client-api-token-controller-issue-client-api-token
title: "Generate a Client API token"
description: "Generate a short-lived, session-bound token for the Client GraphQL API, scoped to an organization and user."
sidebar_label: "Generate a Client API token"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Generate a Client API token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/client/token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Generate a short-lived, session-bound token for the Client GraphQL API, scoped to an organization and user.
